title: Krasnodar、Krasnodar Krai — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Krasnodar、Krasnodar Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Krasnodar是Krasnodar Krai的一个城市，人口约950,000。The capital of the Kuban region, a rapidly growing southern city with a warm climate, known as the gateway to the Black Sea resorts.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
